summary: Build 220 produces the smallest useful sanitized sales-demo readiness packet Jason can use immediately in manual sales conversations. It contains a demo story, proof bullets, sales positioning, the offer, and a sales next-step line. It contains no phone numbers, email addresses, secrets, raw SIDs, credential values, or production data.
demo_story: A roof inspection lead comes in.
An M1 alert is prepared from native workflow logic and was validated live.
If the lead remains unanswered, an M2 follow-up is prepared from native workflow logic and was validated live.
Open leads can be summarized in a daily recap locally.
Source and routing information remains visible locally.
Homeowner outreach remains blocked pending consent and separate approval.

sales_positioning.positioning_statement: RoofLeadHQ helps roofing contractors respond faster to roof inspection leads and avoid letting open leads sit without follow-up.

sales_next_step_line: I can test this with your inbound leads under manual approval first.

demo_surface_status.note: A real product demo UI wired to the live native M1/M2 workflow does NOT yet exist. What exists today is a sanitized marketing website, static sample/mockup pages under website/demo, and sanitized evidence reports/runners that prove the workflow. The exact-copy live SMS proof for M1 and M2 is real and recorded. Building a genuine demo surface that shows the native workflow on synthetic data is identified as the next strategic build target. No UI screenshot was fabricated in this build.
